settings.heading: Firmware updates tied to the right product and version
settings.copy: Use firmware updates when the next step is stability, compatibility, or a required device update.
settings.support_note: Confirm the product and version first, then update only the firmware that matches your exact setup.

settings.heading: Firmware releases by product and platform
settings.copy: Review firmware updates by product, platform, and release guidance before you install.
settings.source_note: Start with the firmware that matches your exact product and platform. Move into manuals or support if the fit is still unclear.

settings.heading: Not sure which firmware applies?
settings.copy: Confirm the product fit first, then move into support if you still need guidance before updating.
